description_long: This object is a decorative mannequin-style doll with a vintage dress form, featuring a headless torso and a flared skirt. The bodice is painted in a muted olive green with a deep V-neckline and short sleeves, while the skirt is cream-colored with a subtle yellow border and delicate floral patterns in soft yellows and browns. The doll stands on a single, sculpted pedestal base that mimics a twisted fabric or ribbon, ending in a round platform. The back of the dress is plain, with the same cream and yellow tones, and the overall finish is matte with a slightly aged, antique look. The object appears to be made primarily of painted ceramic or resin, giving it a hard, smooth surface. This type of doll is often used as a decorative item in urban settings such as shop windows, boutiques, or as a whimsical ornament in residential spaces.
description: A vintage-style, headless mannequin doll in a painted floral dress on a sculpted pedestal base, with a matte, antique finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the deep V-neck bodice, floral skirt details, and sculpted pedestal base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the bodice, the curve of the skirt, and the twisted pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the dress and the yellow border at the hem.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side seam of the dress and the pedestal's shape.
attribute_clothing_style: Vintage-inspired dress with a deep V-neck olive green bodice, short sleeves, and a flared cream skirt featuring a yellow border and hand-painted floral motifs reminiscent of mid-20th-century fashion.
attribute_pose: The doll is in a static, upright pose with a straight torso, arms positioned close to the sides, and no visible head or legs. The base supports the figure in a balanced, vertical stance.
attribute_facial_expression: No facial features are present as the head is missing.
attribute_hair_style: No hair is present as the head is missing.
